comment: Sync-bus heartbeat. Each node updates its entry on every push. See .sync/BUS.md.

claude-local.focus: Empty-genre render guard shipped (1.7.8): metaLine() skips missing genre/year in card+hero, filter pills exclude null — 'NULL' can't reappear for genre-less releases. Remaining: slow first-play fetch (preload/128k); STR001 buy/donate URLs.
